signals.pattern: Watch for multiple unrelated features accumulating on a single branch. Suggest splitting before the PR becomes unreviewable.
Fixes pushed to main don't reach plugin users until they update their cached copy. During dog-fooding, consent and persona fixes were pushed but the installed plugin still ran the old version.
Claude [NAME] slash commands (like /self-improve, /teach, /status) are project-scoped — they load from `.[REPO]/` relative to the working directory. Running `claude` from `~` won't see comma...
Ask about security, access control, and encryption requirements BEFORE building any feature that moves or stores data externally.
